title: ChicknTurtle's 3D Totems HMI
description: An unofficial modified version of ChicknTurtle's 3D Totems resource pack that makes it work when using the Hold My Items (HMI) mod.
body:
This is an unofficial modified version of ChicknTurtle's 3D Totems resource pack that makes it work when using the Hold My Items or HMI mod.

(If the creator of the original resource pack asks, I will take this down.)
